top_signals.title: The Evolution of Ukraine’s Asymmetrical Combat Tactics
top_signals.summary:
In 2022, Scott Sweetow wrote, “Of Roadside Bombs and Drones: Putin’s Looming Insurgency Problem,” where he argued Ukraine’s fight against Russia would rely on a combination of conventional and asymmetrical insurgent tactics. Four years of combat later, we asked Scott to revisit his arguments.Image: National Information Warfare Center PacificIn your 2022 article, you argued that Ukraine’s tech-driven resistance could rapidly evolve into an insurgency-style force. Four years in, how have those assessments held up? Could one argue that Ukraine today operates more like an insurgency in some respects than a conventional state military? Classic insurgencies pit asymmetric or guerrilla forces against organized,

The post The Evolution of Ukraine’s Asymmetrical Combat Tactics appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Nvidia plans to raise at least $20 billion in its first debt sale since start of AI boom
top_signals.summary: Nvidia is set to raise capital in a debt sale for the first time since 2021, when the chipmaker was a fraction of its current size.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Personal Income and Outlays, December 2025
top_signals.summary: Personal income increased $86.2 billion (0.3 percent at a monthly rate) in December, according to estimates released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. Disposable personal income (DPI)-personal income less personal current taxes-increased $75.7 billion (0.3 percent), and personal consumption expenditures (PCE) increased $91.0 billion (0.4 percent). Personal outlays-the sum of PCE, personal interest payments, and personal current transfer payments-increased $90.2 billion in December. Personal saving was $830.8 billion in December, and the personal saving rate-personal saving as a percentage of disposable personal income-was 3.6 percent. Full Text
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Play Opera to hit all the right notes in the Queen Anne
top_signals.summary: ROYAL Ascot kicks off with the Queen Anne Stakes (2.30pm) featuring several high-class performers including Godolphin’s favourite, Notable Speech. William Buick’s ride heads the betting after an impressive victory in the Lockinge, but there could be reason to oppose him at the prices. He has been beaten on both starts at Ascot, including in this [...]

top_signals.title: Arafura Rare Earths eyes Australia’s first ore-to-oxide mine at Nolans
top_signals.summary: Arafura’s production milestone could make it the first rare earths mine in Australia.
